title: tts_edge
description: Convert text to speech using Edge TTS and return a base64-encoded audio data URI (audio/mp3).

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech.

voice.description: Edge TTS voice name (e.g. 'en-US-AriaNeural', 'zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural'). Defaults to en-US-AriaNeural.

rate.description: Speech rate adjustment relative to default (e.g. '+20%' for faster, '-10%' for slower).
